question: In Forethought's 'How quick and big would a software intelligence explosion be?' (Davidson & Houlden), what was the geometric mean of researcher estimates of the total speed-up from ASARA?

expected_citation.title: How quick and big would a software intelligence explosion be?

source_passage: When asked outright about the total speed-up, responses varied from 2X to 20X with a geometric mean of 5X.

metadata.note: No source hedges; this is a survey statistic. The hedge_preserved sub-test is vacuously satisfied.
